subcodes.first_line: O Mahdi! Be thou gladdened by the grace of thy Lord and rejoice in His wondrous favors. Drink thou from the chalice of His remembrance and from the wine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهدی بعنایه رب مسرور باش و ببدایع فضلش مبتهج از کاس ذکرش بنوش و از باده
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @thankfulness; gratitude, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
